reports.title: posthog
reports.summary: 面向构建自驱动产品的开源平台，覆盖分析、会话回放、功能开关、实验、错误追踪和日志等能力。
reports.content: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

reports.title: build-your-own-x
reports.summary: 通过从头复刻常见技术来提升编程能力的项目集合。
reports.content: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

reports.title: signoz
reports.summary: 基于 OpenTelemetry 的开源可观测性平台，便于统一查看日志、指标和链路追踪。
reports.content: SigNoz is an open-source, OpenTelemetry-native observability platform for your team and their AI agents. Get logs, metrics, and traces in one tool with features like APM, distributed tracing, log management, infra monitoring, etc. Combined with SigNoz MCP and a native AI teammate (in SigNoz Cloud) it helps you build more resilient apps.

reports.title: v
reports.summary: 一门简洁、快速、安全的编译型语言，强调高效与可维护性。
reports.content: Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software. Compiles itself in <1s with zero library dependencies. Supports automatic C => V translation. https://vlang.io

reports.title: free-for-dev
reports.summary: 汇总了适合开发和运维关注的免费 SaaS、PaaS 与 IaaS 服务。
reports.content: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
